allow: Bash(powershell -Command "& 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 22 --merge --auto 2>&1; & 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 21 --merge --auto 2>&1; & 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 20 --merge --auto 2>&1; & 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 19 --merge --auto 2>&1; & 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 18 --merge --auto 2>&1; & 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 17 --merge --auto 2>&1; & 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 16 --merge --auto 2>&1; & 'C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' pr merge 14 --merge --auto 2>&1")
Bash("C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr view 17 --json mergeable,mergeStateStatus)
Bash('C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' label create dependencies --description 'Dependency updates' --color 0075ca)
Bash('C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' label create nuget --description 'NuGet package updates' --color 004880)
Bash('C:/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe' label create github-actions --description 'GitHub Actions updates' --color 000000)
